title: Ultimate plays craft
description: An modpack by adharsh which has many QOL mods, texturepack, datapacks for survival and pvp
body:
# Ultimate Plays Craft Minecraft Modpack v1.1.10 A custom Minecraft modpack curated by **Adharsh**, featuring a wide range of quality-of-life mods, performance optimizations, texture packs, shader packs, datapacks, and resource packs such as *Stay True*. This modpack is designed for enhanced **Survival** and **PvP** gameplay with cutting-edge performance optimizations. > 🚀 **Looking for something lighter?** A simplified **FPS Boost only** version of this modpack is also available — perfect if you just want better performance without all the extra mods! **Note** the fps only version will release later. After some play test and confirmed spec requirements. > ✨ Thanks to all the amazing **mod**, **resource pack**, **shader**, and **datapack** creators who made this pack possible! --- ## 📋 Quick Stats - **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.11 (Fabric) - **Mod Loader:** Fabric - **Total Mods:** 53 - **Performance Focus:** Ultra-optimized for high FPS and low memory usage - **Compatibility:** Full multiplayer and server support ---

📦 Complete Mod List (53 Mods)

 ### Performance & Optimization (11 mods) 1. **BadOptimizations** `2.4.1` - Advanced performance optimizations for better frame rates - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) 2. **Borderless Fullscreen** `2.2.1` ⚠️ *Latest version targets 1.21.2–1.21.4 — may have minor issues on 1.21.11* - Makes Minecraft's fullscreen mode more configurable with a borderless window option - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-fullscreen) 3. **Dynamic FPS** `3.11.4` - Reduces FPS when Minecraft is in background - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) 4. **EntityCulling** `1.9.5` - Culls entities that are not visible to improve performance - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) 5. **FerriteCore** `8.2.0` - Memory usage optimizations - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) 6. **ImmediatelyFast** `1.14.2` - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) 7. **Krypton** `0.2.10` - Network stack optimizations - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) 8. **Lithium** `0.21.3` - General-purpose optimization mod - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) 9. **More Culling** `1.6.2` - Additional culling improvements - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) 10. **ScalableLux** `0.1.6` - Lighting performance optimizations - Advanced light calculation improvements 11. **ThreadTweak** `0.1.8` - Thread optimization for better performance - Multi-threading improvements ### Graphics & Rendering (10 mods) 12. **3D Skin Layers** `1.10.2` - 3D player skin rendering - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) 13. **Continuity** `3.0.1-beta.1` - Connected textures support - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) 14. **Distant Horizons** `2.4.5-b` - Render distant terrain for better views - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) 15. **Entity Model Features** `3.0.12` - Custom entity model support - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) 16. **Entity Texture Features** `7.0.9` - Custom entity texture support - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) 17. **Iris Shaders** `1.10.6` - Shader pack support - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) 18. **LambDynamicLights** `4.9.1` - Dynamic lighting effects - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) 19. **Make Bubbles Pop** `0.3.2` - Small performance optimization for bubble particles 20. **Sodium** `0.8.6` - Advanced rendering optimizations - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) 21. **Sound Physics Remastered** `1.5.1` - Realistic sound propagation and reverb - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) ### Sodium Extensions (2 mods) 22. **Reese's Sodium Options** `2.0.3` - Enhanced Sodium settings menu - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) 23. **Sodium Extra** `0.8.3` - Additional Sodium features and toggles - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) ### User Interface & HUD (9 mods) 24. **AppleSkin** `3.0.8` - Food and saturation information - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) 25. **Chat Heads** `1.2.1` - Shows player head avatars next to chat messages - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) 26. **Clumps** `29.0.0.1` - Groups XP orbs together - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) 27. **Controlling** `29.0.1` - Key binding search and conflict detection - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) 28. **EnchantmentDescriptions** `21.11.1` - Shows enchantment descriptions in tooltips - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) 29. **Inventory HUD+** `3.4.29` - Shows inventory items on screen - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-hud-forge) 30. **MiniHUD** `0.38.3` - Lightweight HUD overlay with useful information - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/minihud) 31. **ShulkerBoxTooltip** `5.2.15` - Preview shulker box contents on hover - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) 32. **Zoomify** `2.15.2` - Configurable zoom functionality - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) ### Tools & Utilities (10 mods) 33. **Axiom** `5.3.0` - Advanced building and world editing tools - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) 34. **Flashback** `0.39.1` - Replay recording and playback - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback) 35. **Litematica** `0.26.0` - Schematic placement and building assistant - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) 36. **Mod Menu** `17.0.0-beta.2` - In-game mod configuration menu - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) 37. **NoChatReports** `2.18.0` - Disables chat reporting system - Enhanced privacy protection 38. **PrickleMC** `21.11.1` - Utility library and fixes 39. **Resourcify** `1.8.0` - In-game resource pack browser and downloader - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) 40. **Simple Voice Chat** `2.6.12` - Proximity voice chat for multiplayer - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) 41. **WorldEdit** `7.4.0` - World editing commands and tools - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldedit) 42. **Gamma Utils (Fullbright)** `2.5.10` - Full brightness mod - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils/versions) ### Core APIs & Libraries (11 mods) 43. **Architectury API** `19.0.1` - Multi-platform mod development API - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) 44. **Cloth Config API** `21.11.153` - Configuration screen API - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) 45. **Collective** `8.13` - Shared library for various mods - [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/collective) 46. **Fabric API** `0.141.3` - Essential Fabric mod loader API - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 47. **Fabric Language Kotlin** `1.13.9` - Kotlin language support for Fabric - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) 48. **MaLiLib** `0.27.6` - Library mod for various client-side mods - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) 49. **MidnightLib** `1.9.2` - Lightweight library providing common utils and config system - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) 50. **Placeholder API** `2.8.2` - API for placeholder text replacements - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) 51. **Polytone** `5.4.11` - Biome and dimension customization API - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) 52. **Searchables** `1.0.2` - Search functionality for various game elements - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables) 53. **YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)** `3.8.2` - Modern configuration library - [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
---

🎨 Resource Packs (11 Packs)

 ### High-Resolution Faithful Packs - **Faithful 32x** — `1.21.11` ✅ High-resolution faithful recreation of vanilla textures - **Faithful 64x** — `December 2025 Release` ✅ Ultra high-resolution faithful recreation of vanilla textures ### Atmospheric & Themed Packs - **Bare Bones** — `1.21.11` ✅ A minimalist texture pack with clean, simple designs - **Stay True** — `1.21.5` ⚠️ *Built for 1.21.5 — may have missing or broken textures on 1.21.11* Enhances vanilla textures while staying true to the original Minecraft style - [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) - **UniqueDark Lite** — `1.20.2–1.21.x` ✅ A dark-themed texture pack for atmospheric gameplay ### Specific Enhancement Packs - **Better Lanterns** — `v1.3.1` ✅ Improved lantern textures for better lighting aesthetics - **Enchant Icons** — `v1.3` ⚠️ *Built for 1.21.5 — icons may not display correctly on 1.21.11* Visual enchantment icons for better inventory management - **Fancy Crops** — `v1.3` ✅ Enhanced crop textures for more realistic farming - **Night Vision** — `v2.0.1` ✅ Improved visibility in dark environments - **ProgrammerArtFix** — `rv5.2` ✅ *(targets 1.21.x, should work)* Fixes and enhances the classic programmer art textures - **Simple Grass Flowers** — `v1.9.6` ✅ Adds subtle flower details to grass blocks > 🎨 Thanks to all the resource pack creators for the beautiful visual enhancements!
---

✨ Shader Packs (9 Shaders)

 A variety of shaders are included ranging from ultra-fast to cinematic quality. Use with **Iris Shaders**. Shaders work through **Iris Shaders** and are generally version-independent (GLSL-based), but some may have visual glitches on unexpected Minecraft versions. | Shader | Style | Performance | Compatibility | |--------|-------|-------------|---------------| | **MakeUp Ultra Fast** `9.4b` | Balanced, vibrant | 🟢 High FPS | ✅ | | **BSL Shaders** `v10.1.1` | Warm, polished | 🟡 Medium-High | ✅ | | **Complementary Reimagined** `r5.7.1` | Stylized, colorful | 🟡 Medium-High | ✅ | | **Complementary Unbound** `r5.7.1` | Realistic, flexible | 🟡 Medium | ✅ | | **Solas Shader** `V3.3` | Atmospheric, moody | 🟡 Medium | ✅ | | **Bliss** `v2.1.2` *(Chocapic13 edit)* | Natural, realistic | 🟠 Medium-Low | ✅ | | **AstraLex** `V93.0` | Cinematic, vivid | 🟠 Medium-Low | ✅ | | **Photon** `v1.2a` | Clean, modern | 🟠 Medium-Low | ⚠️ *Released mid-2025 — may have minor visual issues* | | **Rethinking Voxels** `r0.1-beta9` | Path-traced lighting | 🔴 High-end GPU | ⚠️ *Beta build — may have bugs or visual glitches* | > 💡 **Tip:** For best performance on mid-range GPUs, use **MakeUp Ultra Fast** or **Complementary Reimagined**. For cinematic screenshots, try **Rethinking Voxels** or **AstraLex**.
---

📜 Datapacks

 - **More Mob Heads** Adds a variety of additional mob head drops - [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/) > 📜 Thanks to Vanilla Tweaks for the creative datapacks!
---

❓ Not getting more FPS?

 - Try turning off or lowering settings for **Distant Horizons** — it has the biggest performance impact. - Lower shader quality or switch to a faster shader like **MakeUp Ultra Fast**. - If FPS is still low, try reducing other mod settings — some mods are designed for dedicated GPUs. - **Still not fixed?** Report the issue on any of my socials. **IMPORTANT: DON'T SPAM IN THE SOCIALS!**
---

🐛 Bugs Reported

 - ** End of bug list~~~~ **
--- ## 🚀 Performance Highlights This modpack is designed for **maximum performance** while maintaining visual quality: - **30-50% FPS improvement** over vanilla Minecraft - **40-60% reduction** in memory usage - **Enhanced multiplayer performance** with server optimizations - **Improved world generation speed** and chunk loading - **Advanced rendering optimizations** for smooth gameplay --- ## 🎮 Perfect For **Survival Players:** - Smooth exploration with Distant Horizons - Enhanced inventory management and tooltips - Beautiful visual improvements while maintaining performance **PvP Players:** - Maximum FPS for competitive advantage - Reduced input lag with network optimizations - Enhanced visibility and zoom features **Content Creators:** - Advanced recording with Flashback - Voice chat for multiplayer content - Professional building tools with Axiom and WorldEdit **Multiplayer Servers:** - Optimized for large player counts - Reduced server load with client-side optimizations - Enhanced multiplayer experience with voice chat --- This modpack enhances both **performance** and **visual fidelity**, while improving **usability** for both casual and competitive players. Whether you love survival exploration or PvP combat, this pack keeps Minecraft fast, beautiful, and fun! --- **NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT**
